label: Techprints maker
description: Generates techprint items, weighted by the player's current research needs and optionally scaled by a market value factor.

weightAccordingToPlayerNeeds.label: Weight according to player needs
weightAccordingToPlayerNeeds.description: When true, techprints for research projects the player still needs are given higher weight.

marketValueFactor.label: Market value factor
marketValueFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the market value of generated techprints. Private in source but serialized in shipped XML.
